text.message: I won’t race u for a nb
I said that meant I wouldn’t race u
I don’t even know why u were trying to go there
i lost.. 2 plow slowed me a lot...
How was my starting spot a plow lol
Black you have good wheat port
u have road + strongest dev play
u wont.. thats the wort part hahaha
You’re literally tied despite two plows
I don’t have a port tho
I don’t think I’m getting army lol
Someone needs to compete on road
You just don’t want black or blue taking your army
I’d rather they have road than you
You’d rather they not see their win condition involves beating u for army
What makes it u over red
i didnt use it before because red c leared for me
but i cant get road or army, need to build to 10
What makes red stronger than u
Don’t u have higher production with same points
maybe i think im weak because u already won hahaha
With red on 8 I don’t think that’s accurate lol
I got a city way back
You’re making stuff up to avoid hits
Then why didn’t u play ur knight to prove it
I’d rather save if the robber is on me
Everyone knows u have to do that to prove it. You could easily lie like u did about me having a city in hand
Block my wheat and rob red
Blue I can’t believe you are listening to this
And he just get the 10 hit
Bro u didn’t use your “knight” again
Can’t believe blue fell for that
If u wanted to be honest u would show the card
He called u out on your acting
I still don’t have it in handl
I would’ve won after gettin* this card
You could’ve made things so much easier for yourself
This game has never been decided
